site.title: Te Rōpū Mahi Whakauru o te Ao
site.tagline: Mai i te hiahia uru ki te repo tūmatanui
nav.label: Tuatahi
hero.home.eyebrow: Te āheitanga o te Pūtake Tuwhera
hero.accessibility.eyebrow: Te āhei ki te uru atu
meta.home.description: Ka huri te IATF i ngā hiahia tūturu o te āheitanga ki ngā rokiroki puna tuwhera tūmatanui.
meta.projects.description: Tirotiro i ngā kaupapa āheinga tūmatanui i whakaputaina mā te IATF.
meta.propose.description: Tonoa tētahi kaupapa wātea mai i te IATF mā te tukutuku, īmēra, Discord rānei.
meta.governance.description: Pānuihia me pehea te IATF e whakaae ana ki nga kaupapa, e whakahaere ana i nga whare putunga, me te pupuri i nga mahi a te iwi.
meta.join.description: Nga huarahi hei whakauru ki te IATF: te tuku waehere, te whakamaori, te whakamatautau, te pupuri ranei i tetahi kaupapa.
meta.accessibility.description: Me pēhea te whāinga o te IATF ki te pupuri i tēnei paetukutuku e wātea ana, me pēhea te pūrongo i tētahi ārai uru.
meta.transparency.description: Ko ngā pūkete tūmatanui o te IATF: ko ngā whakataunga, ngā kaupapa, me ngā whakahoutanga e tūwhera ana i runga i te taunoa.
actions.emailProjects: Tukuna ngā kaupapa īmēra ki te pouaka mai
registry.empty.title: Kāore he kaupapa i whakaputaina i tēnei wā
registry.empty.body: Kei te whakarite a IATF i tana huinga kaupapa tūmatanui tuatahi.
proposal.form.title: Tukua he tono
proposal.form.body: Whakakiia te puka i raro nei hei tuku tono ki te IATF.
proposal.form.noscript: E hiahiatia ana te JavaScript hei whakamahi i tēnei puka tukutuku. Ki te kore e wātea, whakamahia te īmēra, Discord rānei.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: Kāore i te whirihorahia te tuku ora i roto i tēnei taiao. Ka whakatuwhera tēnei puka i tō kiritaki īmēra hei utu.
proposal.form.loadingProtection: Te whakarite i te tuku haumaru...
proposal.form.ready: Kua rite te tuku haumaru. Ka tukuna e koe te tono, ka waihangahia e te IATF he rekoata whakauru.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: Tena koa whakaotihia te tirotiro tiaki spam i mua i te tuku.
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Kua paahitia te tiaki Spam. Tena koa whakaoti i te tirotiro ano i mua i te tuku.
proposal.form.turnstileError: Kāore i taea te whakaū i te ārai pānuitanga i tēnei wā. Whakamātauria anō.
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: Kua pau te wā o te ārai i te pāhekoheko. Whakamātauria anō.
proposal.form.requiredMessage: Tena koa whakaotihia nga mara e hiahiatia ana i mua i te tuku.
proposal.form.success: Mauruuru. Kua tae mai tō tono, ā, kua tiakina hei arotake.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: Mena ka whakapā atu ano koe ki te IATF mo tenei tono, whakauruhia te tohutoro i raro nei.
proposal.form.successSummaryTitle: He aha te mea i tukuna
proposal.form.errorGeneric: He hapa i puta i te wa e tuku ana i te tono. Tena koa ngana ano. Ki te haere tonu te raru, whakamahia te imeera hei utu.
proposal.subjectPrefix: Ko te tono a te IATF
project.detail.problemTitle: He aha te raruraru ka whakaotihia e tēnei kaupapa
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: Pūtake reo Ingarihi noa, ka taea te tāpiri i ngā whakamāoritanga i muri mai
footer.label: Kāpapa o te pae
footer.accessibility: Te āhei ki te uru atu
footer.blurb: Me māmā ake te tīmata, te whakaputa, me te noho tuwhera.
footer.source: Ko ngā paerewa āheinga e tohutoro ana: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/). Ngā mahi e whakaakona ana e ngā kaiwhakamahi hangarau āwhina.
contact.label: Te whakapā
project.status.seeking-maintainer: E rapu ana i te kaitiaki
translation.label: Te āhua o te whakamāoritanga
translation.source: Ko te reo Ingarihi te reo taketake o tēnei whārangi.
translation.humanReviewed: Kua arotakehia tēnei whakamāoritanga e tētahi kaikōrero pai.
translation.machineAssisted: Ko tēnei whakamāoritanga e tautokona ana e te mīhini, ā, kāore anō kia tino arotakehia e tētahi kaikōrero matatau. E manakohia ana ngā whakaaro mā GitHub.
translation.needsUpdate: I arotakehia tenei whakamaoritanga i mua i te whakahoutanga o te puna Ingarihi hou me te hiahia ki te whakahou.
translation.report: Te pūrongo i tētahi take whakamāoritanga: {{contact.i18nEmail}}He aha te take?
